caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted dreadlocks tied up and wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt sits in a recording studio. She is positioned in front of a professional microphone and is smiling and looking toward someone off-camera to her left. In the background, a television screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text above a blue and white graphic. A yellow vertical stripe is visible on the wall behind her. On-screen logos include "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and "BOSS TALK 101" with a small logo. As the scene progresses, a red and white text overlay appearing on the left side of the screen displays "MZ JAMAICA BOSS TALK 101". The woman maintains her pleasant expression and gaze throughout the sequence, with slight shifts in her facial expression and head position as she listens or speaks.
